subcodes.title: Words spoken at Thornburgh-Cropper home, 1911-09-06
subcodes.first_line: You are all one family; you have grown out of one root. Each of you is like a branch, a flower, a fruit.
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @exhortations and counsels, @love and unity
